item.title: Blue Nile presents Lyndsey Smith
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-05-23T19:30:00.000-05:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.bluenilelive.com/
Lyndsey Smith (Vocalist), the "Goddaughter of Soul," is an award-winning vocalist delivering a powerful fusion of Rock ‘n’ Roll and Soul music. Her transformative voice, forged through personal pain and triumph, consistently uplifts her audience. Lyndsey’s magnetic and unforgettable performances showcase powerhouse vocals, sultry delivery, and electric stage presence, inspired by legends like Etta James and Tina Turner.
ALL SHOWS AGES 21+ FREE ADMISSION WITH VALID I.D.

item.title: The magic is in the Gumbo. The bar will supply the booze, Flav and Kasia provide you 7 minutes to show us your stuff. Poets, Musicians, Comedians, Magicians and whatever you can think of within legal
item.description:
Venue: Poor Boys Starts: 2026-05-28T17:00:00.000-05:00 Categories: Comedy More info: https://www.facebook.com/share/14T5Mey6Nit/ Tickets: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/gumbolaya-the-magic-mic-tickets-1980178041828?aff=ebdsshcopyurl&utm-campaign=social&utm-content=attendeeshare&utm-medium=discovery&utm-term=listing&utm-source=cp
The magic is in the Gumbo. The bar will supply the booze, Flav and Kasia provide you 7 minutes to show us your stuff. Poets, Musicians, Comedians, Magicians and whatever you can think of within legal limits welcome to bring your flavor! Sometimes there's prizes, sometimes there's positive surprises in the mix. There's always fun! It's free, but buy 2 drinks dammit! Pull up, turn up, laugh and savor the flavor of the authentic New Orleans experience! Sign up at 9 start at 9:30. See less

item.title: Laughs Unlimited: Thursdays at The Howlin' Wolf! Join us for an evening where laughter never ends!
item.description:
Venue: The Howlin' Wolf Starts: 2026-05-28T20:00:00.000-05:00 Ends: 2026-05-28T22:30:00.000-05:00 Categories: Comedy More info: www.thehowlinwolf.com Tickets: www.thehowlinwolf.com
Comedy Gumbeaux is a New Orleans Comedy institution. Local, national, and even international comedians have graced our stage, and yet we have space in our “Rising Stars” section for anyone who is brave enough to take the mic. So come on out to get your laugh on or to make them laugh. Every Thursday night at the Howlin Wolf.

item.title: Grammy Award-Winning Irvin Mayfield's Music Church
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-05-28T21:00:00.000-05:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.showpass.com/irvin-mayfield-at-bluenile-2026/ Tickets: https://www.showpass.com/irvin-mayfield-at-bluenile-2026/
Irvin Mayfield is a Billboard and two-time Grammy Award- winning artist, composer, and producer. His 30+ record discography and published written works keynote three decades of world-tours, recorded performances, and collaborations with distinguished artists such as Stevie Wonder, Bob Weir, Frank Ocean, Aaron Neville, Wynton Marsalis, and Trombone Shorty.
A humanist born, raised, and presently residing in New Orleans, LA, Mayfield espouses a daily practice of constant reimagination in his community. His upcoming recording and live performance projects engage global thought leadership edging on the frontiers of art, media, technology and beauty.
9PM
Special Guests announced weekly.
Advance Tickets $20
Reserved Seating $25
VIP Area $400, Available as upgrade to your GA Ticket.

item.title: Head to BB's Stage Door Canteen for a live instrumental showcase of wartime piano music.
item.description:
Venue: Higgins Hotel New Orleans Starts: 2026-05-29T17:00:00.000-04:00 Ends: 2026-05-29T18:00:00.000-04:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.nationalww2museum.org/programs/wartime-piano-happy-hour Tickets: https://ticketing.nationalww2museum.org/webstore/shop/viewItems.aspx?cg=Tickets&c=WPHH
After your Museum visit, join us for a live instrumental showcase of wartime piano music at The Higgins Hotel's Patriots Circle Lounge! Guests of all ages can tap along to favorites like “Sentimental Journey” and “I’ll Be Seeing You” and learn how these tunes coincided with significant events of World War II. Beverages are available for purchase at Kilroy's Bar & Lounge.

item.title: Blue Nile presents The Soul Rebels
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-05-31T00:00:00.000-04:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.showpass.com/soul-rebels-blue-nile-may-2026/ Tickets: https://www.showpass.com/soul-rebels-blue-nile-may-2026/
A﻿DVANCE TICKETS $20
The Soul Rebels started with an idea – to expand upon the pop music they loved on the radio and the New Orleans brass tradition they grew up on. They took that tradition and blended funk and soul with elements of hip hop, jazz and rock all within a brass band context. The band has built a career around an eclectic live show that harnesses the power of horns and drums in a deep pocket funk party-like atmosphere. The Soul Rebels continue to chart new territory as they feature in major films, tour globally, and combine topnotch musicianship with songs that celebrate dancing, life, funk and soul.
All sales are final and refunds are only allowed in limited circumstances such as canceled events. If your event is canceled, postponed, rescheduled, or moved, we will attempt to contact you to update you on the status of the event, and inform you of any refund, credit, or exchange procedures.
All shows are for ages 21 and up. Valid ID required upon entry.

item.title: The magic is in the Gumbo. The bar will supply the booze, Flav and Kasia provide you 7 minutes to show us your stuff. Poets, Musicians, Comedians, Magicians and whatever you can think of within legal
item.description:
Venue: Poor Boys Starts: 2026-06-04T18:00:00.000-04:00 Categories: Comedy More info: https://www.facebook.com/share/14T5Mey6Nit/ Tickets: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/gumbolaya-the-magic-mic-tickets-1980178041828?aff=ebdsshcopyurl&utm-campaign=social&utm-content=attendeeshare&utm-medium=discovery&utm-term=listing&utm-source=cp
The magic is in the Gumbo. The bar will supply the booze, Flav and Kasia provide you 7 minutes to show us your stuff. Poets, Musicians, Comedians, Magicians and whatever you can think of within legal limits welcome to bring your flavor! Sometimes there's prizes, sometimes there's positive surprises in the mix. There's always fun! It's free, but buy 2 drinks dammit! Pull up, turn up, laugh and savor the flavor of the authentic New Orleans experience! Sign up at 9 start at 9:30. See less

item.title: Laughs Unlimited: Thursdays at The Howlin' Wolf! Join us for an evening where laughter never ends!
item.description:
Venue: The Howlin' Wolf Starts: 2026-06-04T21:00:00.000-04:00 Ends: 2026-06-04T23:30:00.000-04:00 Categories: Comedy More info: www.thehowlinwolf.com Tickets: www.thehowlinwolf.com
Comedy Gumbeaux is a New Orleans Comedy institution. Local, national, and even international comedians have graced our stage, and yet we have space in our “Rising Stars” section for anyone who is brave enough to take the mic. So come on out to get your laugh on or to make them laugh. Every Thursday night at the Howlin Wolf.

item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-06-04T19:00:00.000-07:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.showpass.com/irvin-mayfield-at-bluenile-2026/ Tickets: https://www.showpass.com/irvin-mayfield-at-bluenile-2026/
Irvin Mayfield is a Billboard and two-time Grammy Award- winning artist, composer, and producer. His 30+ record discography and published written works keynote three decades of world-tours, recorded performances, and collaborations with distinguished artists such as Stevie Wonder, Bob Weir, Frank Ocean, Aaron Neville, Wynton Marsalis, and Trombone Shorty.
A humanist born, raised, and presently residing in New Orleans, LA, Mayfield espouses a daily practice of constant reimagination in his community. His upcoming recording and live performance projects engage global thought leadership edging on the frontiers of art, media, technology and beauty.
9PM
Special Guests announced weekly.
Advance Tickets $20
Reserved Seating $25
VIP Area $400, Available as upgrade to your GA Ticket.

item.title: Blue Nile presents Kermit Ruffins and the BBQ Swingers
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-06-05T20:00:00.000-07:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.bluenilelive.com/ Tickets: https://www.bluenilelive.com/
"WE PARTYIN'!"
Advance Tickets & Reserved Seating bluenilelive.com
Kermit Ruffins needs only two words to hype a New Orleans barroom for one of his weekly shows, and this, his personal slogan, sums up what this Big Easy ambassador is all about.
From playing himself in the HBO Series Treme, to barbecuing outside his bar, Kermit’s Treme Mother-inLaw Lounge, to sitting in with Jon Batiste and Stay Human on The Late Show with Stephen Colbert, the trumpeter/vocalist keeps himself busy when he isn’t on stage doing what he does best—entertaining and sharing his love of life with the world. He personifies the laid-back vibe of New Orleans.
All sales are final and refunds are only allowed in limited circumstances such as canceled events. If your event is canceled, postponed, rescheduled, or moved, we will attempt to contact you to update you on the status of the event, and inform you of any refund, credit, or exchange procedures.
All shows are for ages 21 and up. Valid ID required upon entry.

item.title: The magic is in the Gumbo. The bar will supply the booze, Flav and Kasia provide you 7 minutes to show us your stuff. Poets, Musicians, Comedians, Magicians and whatever you can think of within legal
item.description:
Venue: Poor Boys Starts: 2026-06-11T15:00:00.000-07:00 Categories: Comedy More info: https://www.facebook.com/share/14T5Mey6Nit/ Tickets: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/gumbolaya-the-magic-mic-tickets-1980178041828?aff=ebdsshcopyurl&utm-campaign=social&utm-content=attendeeshare&utm-medium=discovery&utm-term=listing&utm-source=cp
The magic is in the Gumbo. The bar will supply the booze, Flav and Kasia provide you 7 minutes to show us your stuff. Poets, Musicians, Comedians, Magicians and whatever you can think of within legal limits welcome to bring your flavor! Sometimes there's prizes, sometimes there's positive surprises in the mix. There's always fun! It's free, but buy 2 drinks dammit! Pull up, turn up, laugh and savor the flavor of the authentic New Orleans experience! Sign up at 9 start at 9:30. See less

item.title: Laughs Unlimited: Thursdays at The Howlin' Wolf! Join us for an evening where laughter never ends!
item.description:
Venue: The Howlin' Wolf Starts: 2026-06-11T21:00:00.000-04:00 Ends: 2026-06-11T23:30:00.000-04:00 Categories: Comedy More info: www.thehowlinwolf.com Tickets: www.thehowlinwolf.com
Comedy Gumbeaux is a New Orleans Comedy institution. Local, national, and even international comedians have graced our stage, and yet we have space in our “Rising Stars” section for anyone who is brave enough to take the mic. So come on out to get your laugh on or to make them laugh. Every Thursday night at the Howlin Wolf.

PSYCHEDELIC SPEAKEASY!

item.title: Bingo like you've never played before! Full of bad jokes, Strip Tease, AND prizes Lefty Lucy’s Burlesque Bingo is a whirlwind of wholesome good times blended with the cheeky sass of Burlesque!
item.description:
Venue: The AllWays Lounge & Cabaret Starts: 2026-06-17T19:30:00.000-04:00 More info: burlesquebingonola.eventbrite.com Tickets: www.burlesquebingonola.eventbrite.com
LEFTY LUCY’S BURLESQUE BINGO features 3 rounds of Bingo with PRIZES EVERY ROUND — including a New Orleans Gift Set with a free shot, PLUS Lefty Lucy dances to a song the winner selects!
GRAND FINALE PRIZE from GLAM JAM plus gifts from local pop-ups!
But wait—there's more!
#EATLOCAL with a New Orleans/Korean Fusion pop-up from NOLA SNACK BAE offering delicious and unique dishes while you play!
This ain’t your Grandma’s Bingo —
but Grandma will love it!

item.title: FREE monthly line dance classes at The Blue Crab! All skill levels welcome. Hip-hop, country, R&B, zydeco & NOLA classics. Just bring water & dancing spirit!
item.description:
Venue: The Blue Crab Starts: 2026-06-20T07:00:00.000-08:00 Ends: 2026-06-20T08:00:00.000-08:00 Categories: Theater, Stage & Dance More info: https://local.aarp.org/new-orleans-la/aarp-events/
Get your weekend started right with AARP Louisiana's "Movin' and Groovin'" - a free monthly outdoor line dance class at The Blue Crab's scenic lower patio! Perfect for all skill levels, these energetic sessions feature diverse music including hip-hop, country, R&B, zydeco, and New Orleans classics. No experience needed - bring comfortable clothes, water, and your dancing spirit! All ages welcome!
Please sign up here: https://local.aarp.org/new-orleans-la/aarp-events/
Address: 7900 Lakeshore Dr, New Orleans, LA 70124

item.title: The magic is in the Gumbo. The bar will supply the booze, Flav and Kasia provide you 7 minutes to show us your stuff. Poets, Musicians, Comedians, Magicians and whatever you can think of within legal
item.description:
Venue: Poor Boys Starts: 2026-06-25T15:00:00.000-07:00 Categories: Comedy More info: https://www.facebook.com/share/14T5Mey6Nit/ Tickets: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/gumbolaya-the-magic-mic-tickets-1980178041828?aff=ebdsshcopyurl&utm-campaign=social&utm-content=attendeeshare&utm-medium=discovery&utm-term=listing&utm-source=cp
The magic is in the Gumbo. The bar will supply the booze, Flav and Kasia provide you 7 minutes to show us your stuff. Poets, Musicians, Comedians, Magicians and whatever you can think of within legal limits welcome to bring your flavor! Sometimes there's prizes, sometimes there's positive surprises in the mix. There's always fun! It's free, but buy 2 drinks dammit! Pull up, turn up, laugh and savor the flavor of the authentic New Orleans experience! Sign up at 9 start at 9:30. See less

item.title: Laughs Unlimited: Thursdays at The Howlin' Wolf! Join us for an evening where laughter never ends!
item.description:
Venue: The Howlin' Wolf Starts: 2026-06-25T18:00:00.000-07:00 Ends: 2026-06-25T20:30:00.000-07:00 Categories: Comedy More info: www.thehowlinwolf.com Tickets: www.thehowlinwolf.com
Comedy Gumbeaux is a New Orleans Comedy institution. Local, national, and even international comedians have graced our stage, and yet we have space in our “Rising Stars” section for anyone who is brave enough to take the mic. So come on out to get your laugh on or to make them laugh. Every Thursday night at the Howlin Wolf.

item.title: Grammy Award-Winning Irvin Mayfield's Music Church
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-06-25T18:00:00.000-08:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.showpass.com/irvin-mayfield-at-bluenile-2026/ Tickets: https://www.showpass.com/irvin-mayfield-at-bluenile-2026/
Irvin Mayfield is a Billboard and two-time Grammy Award- winning artist, composer, and producer. His 30+ record discography and published written works keynote three decades of world-tours, recorded performances, and collaborations with distinguished artists such as Stevie Wonder, Bob Weir, Frank Ocean, Aaron Neville, Wynton Marsalis, and Trombone Shorty.
A humanist born, raised, and presently residing in New Orleans, LA, Mayfield espouses a daily practice of constant reimagination in his community. His upcoming recording and live performance projects engage global thought leadership edging on the frontiers of art, media, technology and beauty.
9PM
Special Guests announced weekly.
Advance Tickets $20
Reserved Seating $25
VIP Area $400, Available as upgrade to your GA Ticket.

item.title: Head to BB's Stage Door Canteen for a live instrumental showcase of wartime piano music.
item.description:
Venue: Higgins Hotel New Orleans Starts: 2026-06-26T14:00:00.000-07:00 Ends: 2026-06-26T15:00:00.000-07:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.nationalww2museum.org/programs/wartime-piano-happy-hour Tickets: https://ticketing.nationalww2museum.org/webstore/shop/viewItems.aspx?cg=Tickets&c=WPHH
After your Museum visit, join us for a live instrumental showcase of wartime piano music at The Higgins Hotel's Patriots Circle Lounge! Guests of all ages can tap along to favorites like “Sentimental Journey” and “I’ll Be Seeing You” and learn how these tunes coincided with significant events of World War II. Beverages are available for purchase at Kilroy's Bar & Lounge.
